widgets.name: Form_EditionIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

widgets.name: Form_CompletionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Producer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_MailingAddress_LineOne_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The mailing address line one of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_MailingAddress_LineTwo_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The mailing address line two of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_MailingAddress_CityName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The mailing address city name of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_MailingAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The mailing address state or province code of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_MailingAddress_PostalCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The mailing address postal code of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_ContactPerson_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the individual at the producer's establishment that is the primary contact.

widgets.name: Producer_ContactPerson_PhoneNumber_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The producer's contact person's phone number.  If applicable, include the area code and extension.

widgets.name: Producer_FaxNumber_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The fax number of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Producer_ContactPerson_EmailAddress_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The producer's contact person's e-mail address.

widgets.name: Insurer_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage firm) by the insurer.

widgets.name: Insurer_SubProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned by the insurer to the sub-producer (e.g., individual) within a producer's office (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Insurer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

widgets.name: Insurer_NAICCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC).

widgets.name: Form_CurrentPageNumber_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The page number applicable to this page.

widgets.name: Form_TotalPageNumber_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The total number of pages applicable to this form (e.g., Page 1 of 4).  If only one page, indicate Page 1 of 1.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

widgets.name: Policy_EffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: NamedInsured_MailingAddress_LineOne_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured's mailing address line one.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_MailingAddress_CityName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured's mailing address city name.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_MailingAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The named insured's mailing address state or province code.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_MailingAddress_PostalCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The named insured's mailing address postal code.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Coinsurance_EightyPercentIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that 80% coinsurance is applicable.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Coinsurance_NinetyPercentIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that 90% coinsurance is applicable.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Coinsurance_OneHundredPercentIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that 100% coinsurance is applicable.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Coinsurance_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a coinsurance percentage other than those listed is applicable.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Coinsurance_OtherPercent_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter percentage: The coinsurance percentage.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_BasicIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is basic.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_BroadIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is broad.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_Specialindicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is special.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is other than those listed.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_OtherDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The cause of loss for the subject of insurance.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_EarthquakeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is earthquake.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_FloodIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is flood.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_OtherIndicator_B
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is other than those listed.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_OtherDescription_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The cause of loss for the subject of insurance.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_SprinklerLeakageExclusionIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is sprinkler leakage exclusion.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_CauseOfLoss_VandalismExclusionIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the cause of loss for the subject of insurance is vandalism exclusion.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Premises_ClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The Class Code for the exposure described by this Group. This code is derived from Insurance Services Office or company code list.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Location_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The location number for the premises.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Building_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The building number for the premises.  Used when more than one building exists at an individual location.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Building_SublocationDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: This describes the particular sublocation in a manner sufficient to distinguish it from other sublocations at a given location.  An example might be "3 story blue structure on the left of the main building".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_LineOne_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The first address line of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_CityName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The city of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The state or province code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_PostalCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The postal code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_SubjectOfInsuranceCode_A
widgets.tooltip:
Enter code: The code designating all unit at risk / coverages that are to be insured at this particular location number / building number combination.

Examples:

B - Building
BUSIN -  Business Income with Extra Expense
BUSER - Business Income with Extra Expense and Rental Value  
BUSRN - Business Income with Rental Value without Extra Expense
BPP - Business Personal Property 
EE - Extra Expense 
FF - Furniture & Fixtures 
LBI - Loss of Business Income 
MACEQ - Machinery, Equipment 
PP - Personal Property 
POTOP - Property of Others 
STK - Stock

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Premises_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit amount for the subject of insurance.

BUSRN - Business Income with Rental Value without Extra Expense
BPP - Business Personal Property 
EE - Extra Expense 
FF - Furniture & Fixtures 
LBI - Loss of Business Income 
MACEQ - Machinery, Equipment 
PP - Personal Property 
POTOP - Property of Others 
STK - Stock

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Premises_LimitAmount_L
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The limit amount for the subject of insurance.

widgets.name: StatementOfValues_Premises_ClassCode_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The Class Code for the exposure described by this Group. This code is derived from Insurance Services Office or company code list.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Location_ProducerIdentifier_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The location number for the premises.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Building_ProducerIdentifier_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The building number for the premises.  Used when more than one building exists at an individual location.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Building_SublocationDescription_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: This describes the particular sublocation in a manner sufficient to distinguish it from other sublocations at a given location.  An example might be "3 story blue structure on the left of the main building".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_LineOne_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The first address line of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_CityName_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The city of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The state or province code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_PostalCode_M
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The postal code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialProperty_Premises_SubjectOfInsuranceCode_M
widgets.tooltip:
Enter code: The code designating all unit at risk / coverages that are to be insured at this particular location number / building number combination.

Examples:

B - Building
BUSIN -  Business Income with Extra Expense
BUSER - Business Income with Extra Expense and Rental Value  
BUSRN - Business Income with Rental Value without Extra Expense
BPP - Business Personal Property 
EE - Extra Expense 
FF - Furniture & Fixtures 
LBI - Loss of Business Income 
MACEQ - Machinery, Equipment 
PP - Personal Property 
POTOP - Property of Others 
STK - Stock
